Bash(gcc --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no gcc"; clang --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no clang")
Bash(cmake --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no cmake")
Bash(wsl -l -v 2>/dev/null || echo "no WSL distros")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "which gcc && gcc --version | head -1; which gcc-14 && gcc-14 --version | head -1; which cmake && cmake --version | head -1; which clang && clang --version | head -1")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "dpkg -l gcc cmake build-essential 2>&1 | tail -5; echo '==='; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'gcc|cmake|clang' | head -10")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo apt update -y 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo apt install -y gcc-14 cmake pkg-config libpcre2-dev 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ps aux | grep -E 'apt|dpkg' | grep -v grep | head -5")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "dpkg -l gcc-14 cmake pkg-config libpcre2-dev 2>&1 | grep -E '^ii|no packages'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo kill -9 311 393 2>/dev/null; wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo rm -f /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend /var/lib/apt/lists/lock /var/cache/apt/archives/lock 2>/dev/null; echo "cleaned")
Bash(wsl --terminate Ubuntu 2>&1; echo "terminated")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq gcc-14 cmake pkg-config libpcre2-dev 2>&1 | tail -20")
Bash(wsl --terminate Ubuntu 2>&1; echo "done")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- whoami 2>&1)
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo -n apt-get update 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(wsl --terminate Ubuntu 2>&1; echo "ok")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- dpkg -l gcc-14 cmake pkg-config libpcre2-dev 2>&1 | grep -E '^ii|no packages')
